title: Regulators' Pioneer Fund round 4
body: "The Regulators’ Pioneer Fund (RPF4) aims to:   keep the UK at the forefront of regulatory innovation and experimentation help create a UK regulatory environment that fosters  business innovation and investment   The fund will sponsor projects led by regulators or local authorities.  This funding round was delivered by the Regulators’ Pioneer Fund (RPF), part of the Regulatory Innovation Office (RIO), launched by the Department for Science, Innovation and Technology (DSIT)  Round 4 ran from opened on 22 May 2025 and 1 July 2022 and closed on Thursday 31 July 2025. Round 4 winners announced on 22 October 2025.  Evaluation reports: previous rounds   National Centre for Social Research (NatCen) evaluation of round 3 Kantar evaluation of round 2 Kantar evaluation of round 1   "
